song.title: Days of Elijah
song.author: Robin Mark
song.lyrics: ;Capo 2 or 3 [V1] .G C These are the days of Elijah, . G D G C Declaring the word of the Lord, . G C And these are the days of Your servant, Moses, .G D G Righteousness being restored.|| . Bm Em And though these are days of great trials, . Am C D Of famine and darkness and sword, . G C Still, we are the voice in the desert crying, . Em7 D G “Prepare ye the way of the Lord!” [C] .C G C Behold He comes, riding on the clouds, . G D Shining like the sun at the trumpet call. . G C So lift your voice, it’s the year of Jubilee, . G D G And out of Zion’s hill, salvation comes. [V2] And these are the days of Ezekiel, The dry bones becoming as flesh. And these are the days of Your servant, David, Rebuilding the temple of praise.|| And these are the days of the harvest, The fields are as white in the world. And we are the laborers in Your vineyard, Declaring the word of the Lord! [B] .G C There’s no God like Jehovah, There’s no God like Jehovah, .G D There’s no God like Jehovah, There’s no God like Jehovah, .(repeat 3x, change to A and repeat chorus 2x or more)
